title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Counsels of a Father to His Son
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Counsels of a Father to His Son.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Counsels of a Father to His Son.

translation.text: From 'Counsels of a Father to His Son': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
